title: Mc Donalds ResourcePack
description: You can rename certain food to retexture it as a McDonalds's menu
body:
This does not change any default minecraft texture, you need to rename Steak, Water Bottle, Cooked Chicken and Baked Potato

Steak -> Big Mac, Philly Cheese Stack

Cooked Chicken -> Chicken Big Mac

Baked Potate -> Mc Fries

Water Bottle -> Mc Coca Cola, Mc Water, Mc Sprite, Mc Fanta

Beetroot -> Side Salad
